title: Magichome Shower Head and Hose 1.5m, 120mm Large Panel Shower Head with 5 Spray Modes, Universal Bathroom High Pressure Showerhead for Low Water Pressure
features: 【120mm Wide Coverage Panel】- Our shower head features a 120mm spray face (40% wider than the spray face of standard shower heads), enveloping you in a curtain-like water flow and reducing shower time by reaching more skin surface at once.

【High-Pressure Shower Head】- This power shower head can increase water flow pressure, delivering a high-density spray that penetrates thick hair and rinses soap faster. Say goodbye to weak water flow frustrations!

【5 Spray Modes】- This shower head features 5 different settings, allowing you to effortlessly switch from gentle rainfall to pulse mode. It is perfect for every family member and can meet your various showering needs, such as daily showers, pet bathing, and bathroom cleaning.

【Premium Shower Head】- This handheld shower head is made of high-quality ABS material with a chrome finish. The chrome plating process not only gives it a stylish appearance but also ensures exceptional durability. The material is lightweight, anti-corrosive, and non-fading, ensuring a long service life.

【 1.5m Universal Hose 】- This shower head comes with a 1.5m shower hose. This shower hose is made of high-quality material with a chrome finish. And the hose with a G1/2 connector(20mm) fits most UK standard showers.
【Tool-Free Installation】- No tools are required! You can easily attach it to your existing shower fixture in just one minute.
